item.title: Microsoft is down this year on fears AI will disrupt Office. Goldman says buy the dip
item.description: Goldman Sachs' $600 price target implies that shares of Microsoft could rally 49%.

item.title: AI disruption fears hit yet another new industry: Media
item.description: The artificial intelligence threat trade hit media stocks late this week, sparking a selloff of names like Netflix, Fox and Walt Disney.

item.title: Deutsche Bank upgrades Airbnb on earnings beat and AI momentum
item.description: Deutsche Bank's $154 price target implies a 33% upside for shares of Airbnb.

item.title: Jefferies turns bullish on AI fraud software name as demand accelerates
item.description: Jefferies sees shares of Mitek System rising 30% from here.

item.title: Friday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
item.description: The S&P 500 posted a third consecutive losing session as concerns over disruption from artificial intelligence weighed down the major averages Thursda...
